message:
Running command: # Check if the librelane process (pnr_run_v4) is still running
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_v4.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "LIBRELANE ENDED"
echo "---"
# Check error.log for issues
tail -20 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/error.log 2>/dev/null
echo "---"
# Check flow.log for current state
tail -20 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/flow.log 2>/dev/null
